nodeMixNote: Intel 18A (14A) pre-HVM; TSMC filing covers only VIS stake sale, no N3/N2/A16 node-mix data disclosed
rationale: Neither the TSM 6-K (May 2026, covering only the VIS block-trade stake sale) nor the INTC 10-Q (Q1 2026, containing XBRL taxonomy and financial statements with no node-specific utilization, lead-time, or pricing disclosures for leading-edge logic) provides any hard numeric supply-chain indicators for the N3→A14 bottleneck stage; Intel's forward-looking statements do flag a potential pause of Intel 14A if sufficient external customer design-wins are not secured, confirming pre-HVM status but supplying no quantifiable metrics.
